title: Vulkanix
description: The best modpack on the Vulkan mod. Which greatly increases fps
body:
Vulkanix 🚀 – your gateway to high FPS and unlimited performance in Minecraft!

Tired of lag and low frames? With this modpack, you’ll forget about stuttering and enjoy smooth gameplay. Vulkanix replaces the standard OpenGL renderer with Vulkan, delivering a significant FPS boost even on weaker PCs. It’s a fully vanilla modpack containing only the essential mods for optimization and resource pack functionality.

 

🔥 Main Features of Vulkanix:

⚡ Lightning-fast performance: Vulkan fully unleashes the potential of your graphics card.

💻 Reduced RAM usage: free up resources for other tasks.

💡 Shader support: enjoy vibrant visuals without sacrificing FPS.

🌐 Optimized network stack: play on servers with minimal lag and delays.

🔎 Renders only what you see: invisible blocks and entities won’t strain your system.

🤖 Smart physics and AI optimization: mobs and blocks require fewer resources.

🌍 Instant language switching: no long loading times when changing languages.

😴 Lower resource usage in background: when minimized, Minecraft automatically reduces its load.

🏆 FPS Tests:

 

Vulkanix

Vanilla

 

 

Q: What if something isn’t working, or I have a suggestion?
A: Let us know on Discord — we’re always open to new ideas!

Q: Is this a client modpack?
A: Yes! Just install it and enjoy boosted FPS.
